en: If your company is required to comply with Argentina Statutory Labor Insurance, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Argentina Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment

Is your company required to comply with Argentina Workers’ Compensation Insurance requirements as regulated by SRT (Superintendency of Occupational Risk Authority) and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Argentina Workers’ Compensation Insurance requirement.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
The company is foreign and on a temporary project (up to 2 years) with labor insurance coverage in its home country and willing to provide proof of coverage upon request.
